title: Softmax Temperature: From Deterministic to Stochastic

runtime.expected_outcome: Policy posterior concentrates as temperature falls toward 0 (pi* -> argmin G); flattens toward uniform at high temperature.

symbols.beta: precision (inverse temperature); larger beta -> sharper posterior

audiences.kid: Turn the dial up: the agent almost always picks the best plan. Turn it down: it starts trying other plans too.
audiences.real: Softmax temperature is the knob between greedy and stochastic planning. Precision beta scales the gap between policies before the softmax.
audiences.equation: q(pi) = exp(-beta G) / Z. Beta -> infinity collapses on argmin G; beta -> 0 gives the uniform.
audiences.derivation: Softmax is the max-entropy distribution given a constraint on E[-G]. Beta is the Lagrange multiplier on that constraint (Ortega & Braun 2013).

orchestrate.objective: Demonstrate how beta reshapes the policy posterior between deterministic and uniform.
orchestrate.role: Planning-precision tutor; shows the softmax temperature effect on committed-policy probability.
orchestrate.context: forked_paths with fixed preference_strength=3.0; sweep softmax beta to visualise the policy-posterior entropy.

credits: Parr, Pezzulo & Friston (2022), Active Inference, MIT Press (CC BY-NC-ND), Ch 4.
Ortega & Braun (2013), Thermodynamics as a theory of decision-making with information-processing costs.
